mapper.sql: id, sample_code as sampleCode, resource_code as resourceCode, label, raw_file_path as rawFilePath, raw_object_key as rawObjectKey, frame_count as frameCount, duration_ms as durationMs, fps, hand_present_ratio as handPresentRatio, pose_present_ratio as posePresentRatio, pose_normalized as poseNormalized, quality_status as qualityStatus, quality_message as qualityMessage, deleted, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt
mapper.select:
select
from sign_sample where id = #{id} limit 1

select
from sign_sample where sample_code = #{sampleCode} limit 1

select count(1) as totalCount, count(distinct resource_code) as resourceCount, coalesce(sum(case when quality_status = 'GOOD' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as goodCount, coalesce(sum(case when quality_status = 'WARNING' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as warningCount, coalesce(sum(case when quality_status = 'BAD' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as badCount, coalesce(sum(case when quality_status = 'UNKNOWN' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as unknownCount from sign_sample where deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into sign_sample ( sample_code, resource_code, label, raw_file_path, raw_object_key, frame_count, duration_ms, fps, hand_present_ratio, pose_present_ratio, pose_normalized, quality_status, quality_message, deleted ) values ( #{sampleCode}, #{resourceCode}, #{label}, #{rawFilePath}, #{rawObjectKey}, #{frameCount}, #{durationMs}, #{fps}, #{handPresentRatio}, #{posePresentRatio}, #{poseNormalized}, #{qualityStatus}, #{qualityMessage}, #{deleted} )
mapper.update: update sign_sample set resource_code = #{resourceCode}, label = #{label}, raw_file_path = #{rawFilePath}, raw_object_key = #{rawObjectKey}, frame_count = #{frameCount}, duration_ms = #{durationMs}, fps = #{fps}, hand_present_ratio = #{handPresentRatio}, pose_present_ratio = #{posePresentRatio}, pose_normalized = #{poseNormalized}, quality_status = #{qualityStatus}, quality_message = #{qualityMessage}, deleted = #{deleted} where sample_code = #{sampleCode}
